title: Seclosia Redstone Modpack
description: This a modpack with a range of technical mods perfect for any technical and redstone player. It also includes a few QoL features, with non of the mods included altering vanilla gameplay.
body:
This is a modpack aimed at technical players in order to make gameplay easier while also including features to enhance the current gameplay, with things such as shaders and performance mods. The aim with this range of mods however is also to not change the vanilla gameplay in any way, other than optional settings, which are off by default, such as the carpet mod. This means the modpack should work on any fabric or vanilla server, which most TMC servers run on. In adition, viafabric has been installed, which will allow you to connect to servers on different versions, which will mean you can play on more servers without having to make a new instance for different versions. (note: when connecting to servers on later versions, the new items will not show up properly. On earlier versions, you will have items in the creative menu which will not function.)

   The selection of performance enhancing mods is pretty much comprehensive, with little gained from adding further mods (other than ones such as nvidium, which don't work on all computers). Some visual mods have been added too, which can make the game's visuals slightly better without affecting it too much, but these can of course be removed if you do not like them. Furthermore, there are some mods included such as a bedrock breaker mod (using only vanilla mechanics though) and a minimap mod, which may not be permitted on some servers, so be sure to check these and feel free to remove them from your mods folder.

   The full list of mods is as follows:
- axiom
- carpet
- carpet extra
- carpet tis addition
- cloth config
- entity model features
- entity texture features
- fabric api/quilted fabric api
- g4mespeed
- immediately fast
- iris
- isometric renders
- itemscroller
- joa carpet
- litematica
- malilib
- midnight lib
- minihud
- mod menu
- nbt autocomplete
- owo lib
- pistorder
- reese's sodium options
- replay mod
- sodium extra
- sodium
- spark
- syncmatica
- viafabricplus
- world edit
- xaero's minimap
